description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior walls are finished in a light beige color, accented by deep red-brown trim around the windows, doors, and roof edges. The front features a covered porch supported by two columns, with a balcony above that is enclosed by a glass railing. Large rectangular windows are asymmetrically placed on all sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. A prominent vertical structure on one side of the house adds architectural interest and likely houses a stairwell or utility shaft. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a paved area at the front, suitable for a driveway or walkway.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, beige walls, red-brown trim, large windows, and a covered front porch with a balcony above.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, balcony, and large central windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, a large window, and the vertical architectural feature.
description_view_2: Rear view with multiple windows and a simple, unadorned facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the vertical structure, balcony, and part of the covered porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with two columns, steps, and a balcony above; modern door with large glass panels.
